taxonomy_v3: Engineering and Development, Software Engineering, Quality Assurance Engineer
core_skills: Quality Assurance, Manual testing, Test automation, Web applications testing, Defect tracking
skill_match_scores: Quality Assurance:0.0, Manual testing:1.0, Test automation:0.0, Web applications testing:0.0, Defect tracking:0.5
must_have_quals: 4+ years of experience in Quality Assurance, including hands‑on testing, Experience building and maintaining automated tests, Strong manual testing experience for web applications, Familiarity with defect tracking and release validation, Excellent attention to detail and analytical skills, Ability to quickly learn complex systems, Strong communication skills, Willingness to work on‑site in Nashua, NH
preferred_quals: Experience with Cypress, ReadyAPI, or similar frameworks, FinTech or payments experience, Familiarity with Azure DevOps, Jira, GitLab, Confluence, Experience supporting production systems, Knowledge of CI/CD pipelines
core_responsibilities: Design, execute, and maintain manual and automated tests for web‑based applications, Build and expand automated regression and smoke test suites, Perform functional, regression, integration, and UAT testing, Validate builds and confirm release readiness prior to production deployment, Identify, track, and verify resolution of defects, Continuously improve QA processes, tooling, and coverage, Triage and reproduce reported issues from internal teams and customers, Assess severity, document findings, and coordinate with Engineering on resolution, Support root‑cause analysis and post‑release validation, Partner with Product and Engineering on QA planning for release cycles
job_summary: Tuvoli builds software and financial technology solutions designed to improve sales, payments, and trip logistics in the business aviation industry. They are seeking a quality-focused professional for the Product Analyst – QA role, responsible for QA execution, test automation, release validation, and production support, while collaborating with various teams to ensure high-quality software releases.
